name: Orange Sponge
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften gelatin in cold water.
2. Dissolve softened gelatin in boiling water.
3. Add sugar and salt to the dissolved gelatin mixture, stirring until everything is well combined.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
5. Strain out any remaining bits of gelatin into a separate bowl or container.
6. Stir in the orange juice until thoroughly mixed.
7. Pour the mixture back into the original bowl with the strained gelatin and stir again.
8. Let it set until partially solidified, but still slightly creamy.
9. Gently beat the egg whites until they become foamy.
10. Fold the beaten egg whites into the gelatin mixture until well incorporated.
11. Spoon the final mixture lightly into serving dishes.
12. Serve immediately or chill for 10 servings.
Mrs. F.D.W., Billings, MT.
